2604.13721.title: FRAGATA: Semantic Retrieval of HPC Support Tickets via Hybrid RAG over 20 Years of Request Tracker History
2604.13721.paper_summary: The technical support team of a supercomputing centre accumulates, over the course of decades, a large volume of resolved incidents that constitute critical operational knowledge. At the Galician Supercomputing Center (CESGA) this history has been managed for over twenty years with Request Tracker (RT), whose built-in search engine has significant limitations that hinder knowledge reuse by the support staff. This paper presents Fragata, a semantic ticket search system that combines modern information retrieval techniques with the full RT history. The system can find relevant past incidents regardless of language, the presence of typos, or the specific wording of the query. The architecture is deployed on CESGA's infrastructure, supports incremental updates without service interruption, and offloads the most expensive stages to the FinisTerrae III supercomputer. Preliminary results show a substantial qualitative improvement over RT's native search.
2604.13721.paper_summary_zh: 超級計算中心的技術支援團隊在數十年的時間裡積累了大量的已解決事件，這些事件構成了關鍵的操作知識。在加利西亞超級計算中心（CESGA），這段歷史已經使用請求追蹤器（RT）管理了超過二十年，但其內建的搜尋引擎存在顯著的限制，妨礙了支援人員的知識重用。本文介紹了Fragata，一個語義票證搜尋系統，結合了現代信息檢索技術與完整的RT歷史。該系統可以找到相關的過去事件，無論語言、是否存在打字錯誤，或查詢的具體措辭如何。該架構部署在CESGA的基礎設施上，支持增量更新而不會中斷服務，並將最昂貴的階段卸載到FinisTerrae III超級計算機上。初步結果顯示，與RT的原生搜尋相比，質量有了顯著的改善。
2604.13721.author: Santiago Paramés-Estévez et.al.
2604.13721.authors: Santiago Paramés-Estévez, Nicolás Filloy-Montesino, Jorge Fernández-Fabeiro, José Carlos Mouriño-Gallego
